title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

claims.text: Fine-tuning language models with human feedback (RLHF) improves alignment with user intent over GPT-3.
claims.source_text: We show an avenue for aligning language models with user intent on a wide range of tasks by fine-tuning with human feedback.

methods.name: RLHF
methods.source_text: we use reinforcement learning from human feedback to fine-tune GPT-3

relations.explanation: RLHF-tuned models preferred over GPT-3 outputs by human raters.

evidence.text: Outputs from the 1.3B parameter InstructGPT model are preferred to outputs from the 175B GPT-3
We start with a pretrained language model
